text_block_list.name: Spe's Letter
text_block_list.text:
Dear Mom,
You won't believe it, but I entered a raffle they
were holding in the shopping district and won two
tickets for a trip to Hokkaido!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Letter
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to head home next weekend, and I'll
be bringing my friend Suzuka! I wrote to you
about her before, remember? Anyway, see you
soon!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We're finally here! I guess the road from the rest of Japan to Hokkaido is a long road!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! It's always a joy to see you in good spirits,
Spe! And welcome to Hokkaido, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I know it's not going to be a long stay, but I really
hope you'll enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Look, Suzuka! This is the shopping district where I
always used to go grocery shopping with Mom!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Spe adores the croquettes that store sells. One
time, she nearly burned her mouth trying to eat
one whole because it was so tasty.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mooom! Don't tell her that story!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That plaza over there's where they hold the big
karaoke contest! Mom and I once—whoa, hang
on! It looks super new and shiny!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It was renovated recently. Now it's a concert
rehearsal space for people who were inspired by
your achievements and want to follow in your
footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
As you may know, we don't have many
Umamusume around here. But I think everyone
wanted to support the few who call this place
home.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see. That's truly wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And next up... Ta-dah! It's my mom's farm!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You oversee such a vast area? It must be
hard.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it is. Long ago, not only did I have to deal
with naughty calves, but also a free-spirited
daughter who kept running through the mud!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Eventually, I started running through the
fields instead!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Over here, Suzuka! These are the fields I was
talking about. Running through them is the best
feeling in the world!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can imagine. They're so spacious, it feels
like you could run to the very ends of the earth
from here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Apparently, Mama used to love running
here too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I run around and play in these fields, it
feels like I'm running alongside her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I see... Um, if it's not too much to ask, may I run
with you here as well?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'd love to! I bet that would make
Mama really happy too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? On your mark, get set...

text_block_list.name: Spe & Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Walking around so much has made me thirsty.
Sorry, Spe, but could you get us some drinks,
please?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Suzuka. Can I ask you how Spe's been
doing? Is she handling herself well?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. She's bright and honest... I think she's a very
strong individual.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I see... Judging from your interactions earlier, I'm
guessing you already know that Spe had another
mother?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Becoming the best racer in Japan wasn't her
dream, but her birth mother's. It's not one she
should feel obligated to shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I've told her that over and over, but she keeps
insisting on becoming the best racer in Japan in
order to make her birth mother and me proud.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't quite know how to explain it, but I
think Spe has always chased after that dream of
her own volition, not out of obligation.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So please, don't worry. Spe always looks like she's
having so much fun when she runs.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. Spe is lucky to have a friend like
you.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll always remain by her side, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew! We finally made it back! So Suzuka, what
did you think of Hokkaido?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was very fun. I learned a lot about you too. It
doesn't seem like you've changed much from
when you were a child, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, don't say that! I guess I'm still the same
deep down, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I definitely changed after coming to
Tracen and seeing you run, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My rivals, my fans... All the different people I've
met have given me the opportunity to grow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Some aspects of me have changed and some
remain the same. But it's the combination of all
those things that make me who I am today!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's very true. Allow me to rephrase what I said.
You've certainly become a lot more resolute.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I feel like I'll be able to see all kinds of
different sights as long as I'm with you, Spe.
